Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Evidentiary Hearing Brief, Pts And Auth In Support Of Mtn For Default Judgment, Ntc Of Mtn For Default Judgment, Pltf'S Request For An Evidentiary Hearing In Support Of A Court Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Michael Terrizzi, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CANDRESTICK VIEW HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, a California Non-Profit Mutual Benefit Corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SHAWN COLEMAN.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Melissa Gonzales and Terin Reeder and Melissa Miller Gonzalez sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $17,912.85
Pre-Judgment Interest: $6,970.39
Attorney's Fees: $3,000.00
Costs: $435.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $28,318.24
Judgment signed in open court.
